summary: P0 Backend Router Extraction Verification Complete - All 19 backend tests passed, all extracted routers (auth, analytics, notifications, cards, accounts) working correctly. Frontend admin dashboard fully functional with all sidebar sections loading data.

minor.issue: FIXED - AuthService.get_user was only searching by string _id, not ObjectId. Added ObjectId fallback search.

auth_router.POST /api/v1/auth/login: PASS - Returns access_token and user object
auth_router.GET /api/v1/auth/me: PASS - Returns current user info (after fix)

cards_router.GET /api/v1/admin/card-requests: PASS - Returns paginated card requests with user info

accounts_router.GET /api/v1/admin/accounts-with-users: PASS - Returns paginated accounts with user info

transfers_in_server.GET /api/v1/transfers: PASS - Returns user transfers (still in server.py)
transfers_in_server.GET /api/v1/admin/transfers: PASS - Returns admin transfers with pagination (still in server.py)

frontend_tests.login_page: PASS - ecommbx login page loads correctly
frontend_tests.admin_dashboard: PASS - Dashboard shows Overview with charts and stats
frontend_tests.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All menu items visible and clickable: Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers Queue, Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Settings
frontend_tests.stats_cards: PASS - Total Users (91), Active Users (73), Pending KYC (1), Transactions (131), Volume (€36.5M)
frontend_tests.charts: PASS - User Growth and Monthly Transactions charts render with data
frontend_tests.card_requests_section: PASS - Shows 8 pending requests with correct tabs (PENDING/FULFILLED/REJECTED)
frontend_tests.transfers_queue_section: PASS - Shows 38 transfers with pagination, status tabs, sender/beneficiary info
frontend_tests.users_section: PASS - Shows 91 users with filters, pagination, role/status info
frontend_tests.accounts_section: PASS - Account Control with search functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 routers successfully extracted: auth.py, analytics.py, notifications.py, cards.py, accounts.py
Transfers endpoints remain in server.py as expected (not extracted yet)
Fixed AuthService.get_user to handle both string and ObjectId user IDs
All routers maintain 100% behavior parity with original server.py implementation
Proper dependency imports from routers/dependencies.py (get_current_user, require_admin, create_audit_log)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test account as specified
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 extracted routers verified working: auth, analytics, notifications, cards, accounts. Fixed AuthService.get_user ObjectId bug. Transfers endpoints remain in server.py. All admin dashboard sections loading data correctly. Test file: test_all_extracted_routers.py
rca_of_issue: Minor bug found and fixed: AuthService.get_user was only searching by string _id, not handling ObjectId format. Fixed by adding ObjectId fallback search pattern consistent with other authentication code.
